candidate_llm_application: LLM model-merging via Coptic-style modular stitching: bind sub-modules with weight-space chain-stitches that allow individual replacement without retraining the full model.

results.title: Model Merging / Modular Composition: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on model merging / modular composition, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
